title: oxalis corniculata var. longepedunculata
intro: Oxalis corniculata var. longepedunculata, also known as the pointed-leaf oxalis or wood sorrel, is a perennial herb belonging to the wood sorrel family (Oxalidaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it beneficial for treating various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Oxalis corniculata var. longepedunculata include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and decoctions, are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
